feed.title: AO3 - Robincest (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Robincest on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Stakeout Project
entry.summary:
Author: HotMolasses

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,807Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 462

Summary: Dick never knew what he would find when he came back to a safehouse when all four of them were living there.  Sometimes it was to them fighting over the remote to the point the couch was tipped over and somebody was in a headlock.  Sometimes it was to the three of them kicking some other team’s ass at a video game and high-fives all around.  Sometimes it was to a kitchen covered in sauce and the fire alarm going off. And tonight, apparently, it was to Jason’s arm shoved up Tim’s ass halfway to the elbow, while Tim’s head hung  over the other edge of the table upside-down.  His expression looked absolutely blissed out, to the point that he could barely open his eyes.  Jason gave a soft thrust with his arm and Tim moaned like an absolute whore, and the sound went straight to Dick’s cock.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: There’s at Least One Thing I Like About the Two of You
entry.summary:
Author: DirtyDamiFan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,158Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 352

Summary: Damian has been forced to patrol with two of his least favorite people in all of Gotham. Why did his father insist on this?Well, Damian soon finds out the answer for himself. It starts with a naughty idea but soon becomes so much more than that when lust quickly takes over the three Boy Wonders.Who would have thought that Damian in fact does like two very big things about Jason and Tim?A Jason, Damian and Tim smut one shot.

entry.title: With an Ass Like That, How Can a Bat-Brother Resist?
entry.summary:
Author: DirtyDamiFan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,610Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 338

Summary: After an exhaustive training session, Damian Wayne had planned on enjoying a nice shower.However, his big brother Dick Grayson has other ideas, and when Damian sees what his predecessor is packing, he is quick to agree.It isn’t long until the two Boy Wonders find themselves doing more than washing up.A Dick and Damian smut one shot.

entry.title: red collar, blue collar
entry.summary:
Author: sneck

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,963Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 1,007

Summary: “Where are you going? There’s a shower down here!” Dick calls after Damian, who ignores him. The grandfather clock closes after him and Dick shakes his head in bewilderment. “He’s been doing that a lot lately. I hope nothing’s wrong.”Tim spares Dick an amused look while he dumps his own sweaty clothes in the bin for washing. “What, ignoring you? Sorry to break it to you, Dick, but Damian’s been doing that for the last seven years.”-In which Damian eventually learns that he likes taking orders.written for BottomDamianWayneWeek2020
